chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA 01 of 2026 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No. 2 & 28 2. For hearing of CMA No. 02/2026 3. For hearing of main case 4. For hearing of CMA No. 04/2026 27.01.2026 Mr. Umer Ilyas Khan, advocate for the applicant Mr. Shamshad Ahmed Narejo, advocate for respondent Under instructions learned counsel for the applicant does not press this reference application which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 63 of the Sindh Sales Tax on Services Act, 2011. Judge Judge Amjad
